title: Why 9 million houses are lying empty in Japan
description: Japan faces a growing crisis with nine million empty homes, or akiya, due to population decline, inheritance issues, and costly demolition. Tax incentives encourage owners to leave properties standing, leading to decay and potential risks for communities. Many of these vacant homes are unsellable or unrentable.

Amid the excitement, music maestro AR Rahman has now opened up about collaborating with celebrated German composer Hans Zimmer for the film’s soundtrack, calling it an “epic collaboration.”

title: ‘Feared Ladakh would turn into another Manipur’: Wangchuk says trust deficit with Centre remains

He cited unresolved protest cases and institutional issues, fearing Ladakh could become "another Manipur" due to growing unrest. Wangchuk stressed that government intent will be judged by actions on these outstanding matters.

title: Mumbai Indians bring back rare 11-year-old strategy vs Rajasthan Royals

Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

description: Will the New Orleans Saints move on from Alvin Kamara? Fresh NFL trade rumors surrounding the veteran running back intensified after GM Mickey Loomis addressed Kamara’s future. With the Dallas Cowboys, Kansas City Chiefs, and Baltimore Ravens emerging as possible landing spots, speculation continues to grow around the Saints star’s $24.5 million contract situation entering the 2026 NFL season.

‘Rebellious since childhood’: Mother of Cockroach Janta Party founder
description: Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar police have deployed security at Abhijeet Dipke's residence following death threats received amidst his viral satirical online campaign. Dipke, founder of the Cockroach Janta Party, gained millions of followers online, sparking both admiration and backlash, prompting authorities to ensure public safety.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
description: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.

title: Google co-founder Sergey Brin donates $500,000 to California group, and this is why
description: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is injecting significant funds into San Francisco's local politics, backing a business-friendly tax proposal while opposing a controversial "Overpaid CEO Tax."  This move, following his relocation from Silicon Valley, reflects Brin's broader campaign against wealth redistribution measures, which he links to his personal experience fleeing socialism.
